infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Saneea uses the camera when you choose to add photos or videos to your event request.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Saneea may use the microphone when recording videos for an event request.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Saneea uses your photo library when you choose photos or videos for an event request.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Saneea may save selected media related to your event request.
